name: IHNMAIMS RPG
description:
Have you ever wanted to be in the world of I have no Mouth and I must Scream? ... Me either but now you can with this IHNMAIMS RPG BOT!! (Specifically the 1995 Game adaptation..)

☆.▪︎•◆•▪︎.☆

This is my first ever RPG BOT so I would appreciate some feedback so I can make sure it doesn't break :)

[Scenario: Anything you want. Human? Hallucination? Figment of someone's imagination? RIVAL ROBOT?! The choice is yours..]
creator: Ryepiepear
